description_give: This act was drawn up between the handing party {giverName}, on one side, and the receiving party {receiverName} {deptText}, on the other side. The following inventory items (TMC) were registered with this document:
table_title: List of Handed Over Inventory Items:
footer_text: The handed over inventory items were delivered in full set, in good working condition. The parties have no claims against each other.
